student.title: Student Profile
student.description: Represents a student's SAMS profile, including contact info, subject topic mastery scores, and milestones

scores.description: Object mapping topic name strings to mastery completion percentages (0-100)

milestones.description: Object mapping topic name strings to array of 4 booleans representing sub-milestones

doubt.title: Subject Doubt
doubt.description: A doubt submitted by a student regarding a subject chapter, which can be answered by the teacher

id.description: Unique identifier for the doubt thread

studentRollNo.description: Roll number of the student who posted the doubt

studentName.description: Name of the student who posted the doubt

topic.description: The specific syllabus chapter topic related to the doubt

question.description: The detailed query or problem described by the student

answer.description: The teacher's answer, or null if unanswered

answeredAt.description: ISO format timestamp of answer, or null if unanswered
